item.title: About
item.description: Photo space A future portrait can live here without changing the whole layout. Technical portfolio, practical labs, problem solving.

item.title: Command management
item.description: Command Management Summary This note is a quick reference for command history and command reuse in the shell.

item.title: File management
item.description: File management Summary This note is a quick reference for basic file and directory handling in the shell.

item.title: Navigation
item.description: Navigation Summary This note is a quick reference for basic shell navigation.

item.title: Networking
item.description: Networking Summary This note is a quick reference for basic network inspection commands.

item.title: Process management
item.description: Process Management Summary This note is a quick reference for checking and controlling running processes.

item.title: Search
item.description: Search Summary This note is a quick reference for finding text and files in the shell.

item.title: System Info
item.description: System Info Summary This note is a quick reference for identifying the current Linux system, checking runtime state, and confirming a few basic host details before you go deeper into troubleshooting.

item.title: Viewing content
item.description: Viewing Content Summary This note is a quick reference for reading files, logs, and command output in the terminal.

item.title: Symlink
item.description: Symlink 1. Goal Understand what ln -s does on Linux, when to use it, and how to verify it safely from the terminal. 2.
